---
title: "Lecture 2: Bob is You"
date: "2026-05-21"
order: 2
description: "A 21-slide companion to the integrated-health article — five dimensions, five integration loops (Walker, Ratey, Holt-Lunstad, Hill & Turiano, van der Kolk), and a radar-plot reveal. Also available as an [HTML article](/bob-is-you.html)."
categories: [presentation, bobbology, health, integration]
path: /assets/bob-is-you.pdf
---

```{=html}
<p>Opening <a href="/assets/bob-is-you.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">the slide deck (PDF)</a>… or switch to the <a href="/bob-is-you.html">HTML article</a>.</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/assets/bob-is-you.pdf");</script>
```
